title: Aurora Cannabis Inc. (ACB) - CNBC Stock Quote and Analysis
text: CNBC provides financial data and market analysis for Aurora Cannabis stock trading. Stock metrics: Current price and volume data updated in real-time during market hours. 52-week high/low reflecting stock volatility. Market capitalization and share count. Key financial data: Latest quarterly financial statements. Revenue trends and growth rates. Profitability metrics including adjusted EBITDA. Cash flow statements and balance sheet analysis. Analyst coverage: CNBC tracks analyst recommendations and price targets. Consensus rating typically Hold to Buy with cautious tone. Key price target ranges highlighted with bull and bear cases. Market commentary: CNBC contributors analyze quarterly earnings announcements. Commentary on management guidance and strategic direction. Discussion of regulatory developments impacting cannabis stocks. Sector analysis: CNBC tracks cannabis sector trends and company positioning within group. Comparative analysis relative to Canopy Growth, Tilray, and other large-cap cannabis names. International cannabis market opportunities highlighted. Charts and technicals: Price charts showing historical trends. Technical analysis indicators tracked by CNBC tools. Breakout and breakdown levels identified for traders. News and updates: Real-time news feed tracking Aurora announcements. Earnings date calendar. Analyst report releases and upgrades/downgrades.
